name: bencium-marketplace
description: Design, architecture, and productivity plugins for Claude Code by bencium.io

plugins.name: bencium-controlled-ux-designer
plugins.description: Expert UI/UX design guidance for unique, accessible interfaces. Always-ask-first protocol for visual decisions, colors, typography, layouts.

plugins.name: bencium-innovative-ux-designer
plugins.description: Distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

plugins.name: bencium-impact-designer
plugins.description: Production-grade frontend interfaces that avoid generic AI aesthetics. Based on Anthropic's Frontend Designer Skill with bold creative commitment.

plugins.name: design-audit
plugins.description: Systematic visual UI/UX audits producing phased, implementation-ready design plans. Purely visual refinement without touching functionality.

plugins.name: typography
plugins.description: Professional typography rules for UI design enforcing correct quote marks, dashes, spacing, hierarchy, and layout. Auto-applies to generated HTML/CSS/React code.

plugins.name: relationship-design
plugins.description: Design AI-first interfaces that build ongoing relationships through memory, trust evolution, and collaborative planning.

plugins.name: adaptive-communication
plugins.description: Detects user communication style (high-context relational vs low-context transactional) and adapts responses accordingly.

plugins.name: negentropy-lens
plugins.description: Decision-support framework evaluating systems through entropy (decay) vs negentropy (growth) while surfacing tacit knowledge gaps.

plugins.name: bencium-aeo
plugins.description: Answer Engine Optimization for AI search visibility. Optimize content for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, AI Overviews citations.

plugins.name: bencium-code-conventions
plugins.description: Code style, tech stack, and workflow conventions for React/Next.js/TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Supabase projects.

plugins.name: renaissance-architecture
plugins.description: Software architecture and UI/UX principles for building genuinely new solutions through first-principles thinking, not derivative work.

plugins.name: human-architect-mindset
plugins.description: Systematic architectural thinking - domain modeling, systems thinking, constraint navigation, and AI-aware problem decomposition.

plugins.name: vanity-engineering-review
plugins.description: Reviews codebases, architectures, PRs, and technical plans for vanity engineering — code built for ego rather than user value.
